prompt_queue.prompt: Industry: health and body. Generate one distinct, buildable store concept for health and body care. Examples of valid sub-spaces: skincare for a specific climate or condition, herbal apothecary, dental and oral care, sleep and recovery tools, mobility and rehab aids, post-surgical care, menstrual and reproductive health, men's grooming, pregnancy and postpartum, sun and skin protection. Stay inside health and body; avoid generic wellness, supplements with bold medical claims, and pure cosmetics-only.
